methods.description: A series of experiments conducted to measure BNF rates using unamended and amended sediment slurry incubations sampled from three sites. Different treatments were applied to assess the impact of various amendments on BNF rates.

steps.description: Collect sediment samples from three coastal marine sites using SCUBA and polycarbonate tubes.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from marine sites using SCUBA

steps.description: Store sediment cores at 15°C and subsample for unamended BNF rate measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: store and subsample sediment cores for BNF rate measurements

steps.description: Sieve collected sediments through 500-µm copper mesh to remove macrofauna and large components.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediments to remove macrofauna and large components

steps.description: Store sieved sediments in a mesocosm with aerated, UV-treated, 0.2 µm-filtered seawater.
steps.searchable_summary: store sieved sediments in mesocosm with filtered seawater

steps.description: Conduct sediment slurry incubations with various treatments including macroalgae and glucose additions.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct sediment slurry incubations with treatments

methods.description: Statistical analysis of BNF rates using R, including linear regression, ANOVA, and non-parametric tests to assess the impact of treatments and site differences.

steps.description: Fit a linear regression model to calculate rates of C2H4 production from ARA incubations.
steps.searchable_summary: fit linear regression model for C2H4 production rates

steps.description: Estimate theoretical BNF rates using a 3:1 ratio of C2H2 reduction:N2 reduction.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate BNF rates using C2H2:N2 reduction ratio

steps.description: Perform Shapiro-Wilk test to determine departures from normality for BNF rates.
Use Fligner-Killeen test to check for homogeneity of group variances in BNF rates.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Fligner-Killeen test for variance homogeneity

steps.description: Conduct two-way ANOVA and Tukey's HSD test for significant differences in BNF rates.
steps.searchable_summary: perform two-way ANOVA and Tukey's HSD test

steps.description: Perform non-parametric two-way ANOVA and post-hoc test for data violating normality assumptions.
steps.searchable_summary: perform non-parametric ANOVA and post-hoc test

steps.description: Calculate Bray-Curtis dissimilarity metric and perform NMDS for community visualization.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate Bray-Curtis dissimilarity and perform NMDS

steps.description: Perform hierarchical cluster analysis and ANOSIM test on Bray-Curtis distances.
steps.searchable_summary: perform hierarchical clustering and ANOSIM test

steps.description: Conduct PERMANOVA test for grouping observations based on specified factors.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PERMANOVA test for group analysis
